view.title: Validate persona scenario #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the 'Waitlist to confirmed booking flow', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use case outlines the cascading appointment process, yet it lacks concrete evidence that the scenario was executed and validated as expected. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
